name: @open-neko/channel-whatsapp
description: WhatsApp channel for OpenNeko (Cloud API): delivers the agent's Briefing, findings, and approvals to a WhatsApp chat (text + interactive reply buttons) and turns replies + button taps back into agent intents. Bidirectional. Runs in a sandbox VM with network egress limited to graph.facebook.com.

env.description: WhatsApp Cloud API access token (permanent system-user token). The plugin calls https://graph.facebook.com/v20.0/<phone-id>/messages to deliver. When unset at exec time the plugin runs in dry-run mode.
The sender phone number id from the WhatsApp Cloud API setup (NOT the phone number itself).
Meta app secret - verifies inbound webhooks (X-Hub-Signature-256, hex HMAC-SHA256 of the raw body). Required only when receiving webhooks.
Webhook GET handshake token (hub.verify_token). The ingress route answers the one-time hub.challenge; the plugin never sees it. Kept here so it lives with the rest of the channel's secrets.
